title: Add non-record local A100 TTT eval-stride0 submission
body:
Adds a non-record 16MB submission folder for a local 1xA100 run focused on the TTT metric.

  Key result: final_int8_ttt_lora val_bpb = 1.3510
  Size: 11,876,675 bytes (int8+zlib total)
  Train cap: 600s (step 856)

  Included:
  - README.md
  - submission.json
  - train.log
  - train_gpt.py (exact snapshot used)
